name: Bill Cole
abstract: William Shadrack Cole is an American jazz musician, ethnomusicologist, professor of music, professor of African-American studies, and author. As All About Jazz jazz journalist Dan McClenaghan put it, "Cole – a rare breed of jazz artist who has focused his efforts on uniting Eastern sounds with the American art form – is a musical seeker …

works.t: The Living Lives Not Among The Dead.  Why Seek It There?

works_created.t: The Living Lives Not Among The Dead.  Why Seek It There?

about_quotes.speaker: Joseph Daley
about_quotes.evidence: one of the CDs I had out last night was the “Trayvon Martin Suite” thing that I did with Bill Cole and everything.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joseph Daley interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, March 18, 2018
